nextSlices.reason: Implements the highest-value missing vn.py operational loop through existing JobManager, PIT validation, manifests and Runtime Catalog rather than creating a second data system.
Adds discoverable per-rule configuration, persistence and real paper pre-order interception evidence while keeping QuantAgent RiskGate canonical.
Adds BaseMonitor-style keyed updates and explicit live, stale, disconnected and replay-gap state for orders, trades, positions, accounts, logs and risk events.
Connects OrderManager, RiskGate, orders, trades, positions, accounts, reconciliation and restart recovery in paper-only mode.
Connects viewport changes to trade and statistic tables, adds incremental updates and establishes 100k and 500k point browser baselines.
Introduces governed script commands first and authenticated process RPC only where isolation is required.
Audits Alpha101 and Alpha158 formulas, source columns, PIT behavior, numeric equivalence and accepted or rejected factor assignment.

safetyInvariants: agents and models cannot submit orders directly
all orders pass RiskGate and KillSwitch
Web jobs accept allowlisted structured commands only
all Web job outputs remain inside Runtime
runtime and checkpoints are never silently rewritten
mock, stale, failed and unverified results remain explicit
